summary: Inventory management app with Excel (.xlsx) upload/download feature. User requests UI language to be Indonesian only, and the downloaded file cannot be opened (bug fix needed).
architectural_notes: UI language must be Indonesian only
known_issues: Downloaded Excel file cannot be opened

existing_features.title: Fix the downloaded Excel (.xlsx) file so it can be opened correctly in Excel and compatible spreadsheet applications. The file generated by the custom XLSX writer in frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts must produce a valid, non-corrupt .xlsx file that opens without errors.

Ensure all user-facing text across the entire application uses Indonesian language only. Any English labels, button text, headings, table headers, placeholder text, error messages, toast notifications, or dialog content that was introduced or changed in the recent update must be reverted or translated to Indonesian, consistent with the language used before the latest changes.
